verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You loved me, When I was so unlovely, You sought me When I was lost;

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You showed me How much You really loved me, When You bought me At the highest cost

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's no greater love than this, There's no greater love than this, That a man would give his life for a friend; There's no higher sacrifice Than a man would give his life, You have paid A precious price for me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You chose me, When I was so unworthy You cleansed me With Your own blood;

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You clothed me With righteousness and mercy, And You crowned me With Your steadfast love

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's no greater love than this, There's no greater love than this, That a man would give his life for a friend; There's no higher sacrifice Than a man would give his life, You have paid A precious price for me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You have paid A precious price for me…
